title: Abrahamia ditimena
taxonomy: Abrahamia ditimena is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It is native to Madagascar and is a part of the genus Abrahamia. The classification of Abrahamia ditimena is that it is a type of tree or shrub in the plant kingdom. The plant's classification is further detailed in the family level, where it belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. It also belongs to the order Sapindales, and the class Magnoliopsida in the kingdom Plantae.
